entries.summary: Data And Trace Architect initialized with persistent memory and rubric-linked responsibilities.

MongoDB persistence should separate authored scenario truth from learner-visible station state, store append-only trace events and LLM audit events, and index knowledge nodes/edges for scenario generation and actor memory retrieval.
Use mongodb-memory-server as the local MongoDB repository contract test path, with MongoMemoryReplSet for transaction-sensitive behavior and production URI tests gated separately.
